title: Lane H3: Group 22 lifecycle spine + Group 23 restart reconstruction tests
boundary: Add 4 tests to truth-closure.test.ts: 2 spine tests (full lifecycle evidence + critic-repair loop) and 2 restart tests (loadLane reconstruction + binder digest preservation)
consumer_purpose: Prove event ordering and binder evidence completeness across the full lane lifecycle, including repair loops and restart reconstruction
claim_atoms: 1. Spine test verifies all 10 lifecycle steps with state assertions at each step
full binder evidence completeness (11 fields checked)
and event stream ordering via loadLane. 2. Critic-repair test verifies the reject→plan→approve→return loop with both reviews in binder. 3. loadLane reconstruction test verifies state
and eventStream are preserved after restart. 4. Binder digest test verifies digest match after reconstruction including all evidence fields.
content:
Append after line 1789 of truth-closure.test.ts (before final `})`).

Uses existing mock EventStore (`secretaryTestLayer`), existing import patterns (Secretary.Service, Effect.gen, Effect.runPromise), and existing Secretary Interface methods (createLane, processEvent, handleRoleOutput, getLaneState, getLaneBinder, loadLane, init).

Group 22: Lifecycle Spine (lines 1790-1940)
Group 23: Restart Reconstruction (lines 1941-2070)
